@@A. The trace exhibits several issues, including disobeying task specifications (agents providing simplified implementations instead of finding the actual code), task derailment (proposing irrelevant code modifications), weak verification (failing to identify errors in generated code), information withholding (providing incomplete information), ignoring other agent's suggestions (continuing despite requests for clarification), action-reasoning mismatch (proposing actions not supported by reasoning), step repetition (repeating the same information), and premature termination (failing to complete tasks due to invalid credentials). There are also instances of loss of conversation history and unawareness of termination conditions.
